hotel.name: Pico Dreams - Sportfish
hotel.location: Sao Roque do Pico, Pico Island, Azores
hotel.amenities_highlight: Sport fishing base with ocean access; boutique character; close to whale-watching embarkation
hotel.review_summary: Guests consistently highlight the island-immersed feel, hands-on host, and direct sea access — a proper base for outdoor Azores, not a tourist hotel.

hotel_alt.name: Casas Alto da Bonanca
hotel_alt.location: Sao Roque do Pico, Pico Island, Azores
hotel_alt.amenities_highlight: Self-catering hillside cottages with volcanic landscape views
hotel_alt.review_summary: Perfect 5.0 from early guests — quaint, quiet cottages above the lava coastline with unobstructed Atlantic views.

activities.title: Whale and Dolphin Watching — Pico Island
activities.description: Small-boat excursion from Lajes do Pico with ex-whalers as guides — sperm whales still resident in the channel in September, common and bottlenose dolphins reliably spotted.

activities.title: Pico Island — Volcanic Lakes and Highlands Guided Tour
activities.description: 4-hour tour through Pico's interior calderas and highland lagoons — Lagoa do Capitão, lava tubes, and dramatic volcanic landscapes rarely seen from the coast.

activities.title: Mount Pico Guided Climb — Summit Portugal's Highest Peak
activities.description: Guided 7-hour ascent of Pico Volcano (2,351m) — Portugal's highest summit and one of the Atlantic's most dramatic climbs, with crater rim views stretching to Faial and São Jorge on a clear September morning.

activities.title: Pico Wine Route — UNESCO Vineyard Landscape
activities.description: Half-day through the UNESCO-listed currais — the extraordinary black lava-walled vineyard plots unique to Pico — with tastings of Verdelho and Arinto wines at a family adega.

activities.title: Whale and Dolphin Watching — Half Day
activities.description: A second shot at the Pico-Faial channel with a different operator — September sightings of sperm whales remain high, and two trips dramatically increases chance of extended surface time.

baseline_context.note: First scan for MAD-PIX route — no historical baseline. €318 appears exceptional but cannot be quantified without prior records.
